Docs.summary: Provides low-level functionality for reading assembly metadata according to ECMA-335. This namespace is designed to be used by compilers and other tools that need to read assembly metadata.

remarks.format:
## Remarks
> [!CAUTION] > The metadata reading types in this namespace, such as <xref:System.Reflection.Metadata.MetadataReader> and <xref:System.Reflection.Metadata.MetadataReaderProvider>, are not designed to handle untrusted input. Malformed or malicious PE files or metadata can cause unexpected behavior, including out-of-bounds memory access, crashes, or hangs. Only use these APIs with trusted assemblies. The <xref:System.Reflection.Metadata.TypeName> and <xref:System.Reflection.Metadata.AssemblyNameInfo> types are safe for use with untrusted input.
This namespace contains the following core classes:
- The <xref:System.Reflection.Metadata.MetadataReader> class, which is used to read an assembly.
